scripts.build:packages: npm run build --prefix packages/bead-core && npm run build --prefix packages/app-shared
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && node scripts/generate-og-png.mjs && node scripts/generate-gallery-pages.mjs && node scripts/generate-seo.mjs --pre && vite build && node scripts/generate-seo.mjs --post && node scripts/prerender.mjs
